positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed stylized illustration of exotic botanicals and abstract jungle foliage, featuring large monstera leaves, delicate fern fronds, and spiraling floral motifs. The style is inspired by mid-century tiki art meets elegant woodcut engraving, rendered with thick black lines and negative space contrast. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, designed to look excellent as a repeating textile print or apparel graphic. Use a limited, earthy color palette: deep teal, burnt orange, olive green, and crisp cream for the background. Flat graphic shading, linocut effect, high contrast, decorative, art deco influence, isolated design.
